methods.description: Process for collecting sediment samples from the seafloor using a Van Veen grab sampler and preparing them for analysis.

steps.description: The sediment in the seafloor was taken using Van Veen grab sampler from 5 stations based on their position in the estuary and their type of fine seafloor substrate, i.e. mud, silt and sand of the Wulan estuary, Demak.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment samples using Van Veen grab sampler

steps.description: Environmental parameters were also measured during data collection includes temperature, pH, water salinity and DO (Dissolved Oxygen).
steps.searchable_summary: measure environmental parameters during sediment collection

steps.description: Upon arriving in the laboratory, after being washed, the samples were then dried under the sun.
The dry sediment samples then were ground and sieved with following mesh sizes, i.e. 0.063, 0.125, and 0.250 mm and put in the plastics sample.

methods.description: Process for collecting foraminiferal specimens from sediment samples and identifying them using morphological characteristics.

steps.description: The samples of foraminiferal then were hand picking in the picking tray.
Each representative specimen was collected into a foraminiferal slide collector.

The function of the specimens collected is only for the identification process and genus documentation using NIS software Elements in the form of photos genus is equipped with the size/magnification of the shell.
steps.searchable_summary: identify and document foraminiferal genus using NIS software

steps.description: Identification process of foraminiferal based on the characteristic of their shells, such as wall composition and structure, chamber form and arrangement, the shape and location of any openings, surface decoration, and other morphologic aspects of the shell.
steps.searchable_summary: classify foraminifera based on shell morphology
